title: KSBJ-093 A Slender Wife Who Fell For The Trap Laid By Her Cuckold Fantasies-Obsessed Husband And His Little Brother Ayaka Muto
description: It was a sudden event. One day I was raped by my husband's younger brother Eita who came home. I was afraid of getting caught by my husband, and the relationship between Zuruzuru and Eita continued, and I kept refusing the night life with my husband because of guilt. However, I begged Eita-san to dissolve the relationship, thinking that this should not be the case. And the last night when the relationship should end ...
